finding_summary: suspect.md body header + frontmatter + body bullets + auto-gen block all agree on 5 anchors, but two body paragraphs (Caveats Agency cross-edge line 65, See-also Discrete Lair future line 90) say 'six' anchors. Likely a pre-commission roster-trim artifact where a 6th candidate was dropped late and the prose counter was not updated.

fixes.before: - **The [[agency]] character-node ([[agency]]) is the natural cross-edge.** All six current Suspect-coded corpus anchors are Agency-operational-register cards or anti-Agency cards (Caught Red-Handed and Convenient Target read as suspect-imposition; Airtight Alibi and Eliminate the Impossible read as suspect-clearance). The mechanic's gameplay loop maps the Agency's investigative procedure at the rules-text scale. The `related_characters: [agency]` frontmatter field on this node encodes the cross-edge; the Agency node may want a reciprocal `related_symbols: [suspect]` update as a downstream sync task.

Adds Deadly Complication-showcase as the 5th anchor's role-attribution (straddles imposition + clearance modes via the MKM storyline pivot), since the prior 4-card enumeration in parentheses left the 5th unaccounted-for.

uncertainty_notes: (1) The Caveats line-65 rewrite adds a third role-attribution for Deadly Complication-showcase (straddles imposition + clearance modes). This is interpretive — the prior 4-card parenthetical at line 65 listed only the first 4 anchors, omitting Deadly Complication entirely. If the operator prefers a minimal-intervention fix, the alternative is a pure 'six' → 'five' replacement without adding the Deadly Complication clause: `All five current Suspect-coded corpus anchors are Agency-operational-register cards or anti-Agency cards (Caught Red-Handed and Convenient Target read as suspect-imposition; Airtight Alibi and Eliminate the Impossible read as suspect-clearance).` That version leaves the 4-card parenthetical's omission of the 5th anchor unaddressed but keeps the edit surgical. (2) The Agency 'eight anchors' count at line 90 was not verified by this dispatch — if Agency's actual anchor count has drifted from 8 since suspect.md was authored, that's a separate finding for a future CBG dispatch.
